# llms.txt - AlphaSwarm.sol

> Multi-agent Solidity security framework. Names lie, behavior doesn't.

## Overview

AlphaSwarm.sol detects smart contract vulnerabilities through behavioral patterns, not function names. It builds a knowledge graph, coordinates AI agents (attacker/defender/verifier), and produces evidence-linked findings.

**Status:** ~98% complete | 84.6% DVDeFi | 78.2% Gauntlet

## Session Starters

| If you want to... | Load |
|-------------------|------|
| Run first audit | docs/getting-started/first-audit.md |
| Understand vision | docs/PHILOSOPHY.md |
| Write patterns | docs/guides/patterns-basics.md |
| Query graph | docs/guides/queries.md |
| Use skills | docs/guides/skills-basics.md |
| Configure agents | docs/reference/agents.md |
| Integrate tools | docs/reference/tools-overview.md |

## Key Concepts

- **BSKG**: Behavioral Security Knowledge Graph
- **Semantic Operations**: 20 behavior-based detections
- **Behavioral Signatures**: R:bal→X:out→W:bal = reentrancy
- **Three-Tier Detection**: Tier A (deterministic) + Tier B (LLM) + Tier C (labels)
- **Graph-First**: Agents MUST query BSKG before conclusions
- **Proof Tokens**: Non-fakeable evidence of execution
- **Validation Gates**: G0-G7 quality gates

## The 7-Stage Audit Pipeline

```
/vrs-audit contracts/

Stage 1: Setup & Validation
Stage 2: Build Knowledge Graph (200+ emitted properties/function)
Stage 3: Protocol Context (Exa MCP research)
Stage 4: Pattern Matching (680+ patterns)
Stage 5: Agent Investigation
Stage 6: Multi-Agent Debate
Stage 7: Report Generation
```

## Quick Stats

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Patterns | 680+ |
| Agents | 24 |
| Skills | 47 |
| Tools | 7 |

## Commands

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| alphaswarm build-kg contracts/ | Build graph |
| alphaswarm query "pattern:X" | Query patterns |
| alphaswarm tools status | Check tools |
| /vrs-audit contracts/ | Full audit |

## Structure

```
src/alphaswarm_sol/
├── kg/builder/       # Graph construction
├── orchestration/    # Pool workflows
├── tools/adapters/   # 7 tool integrations
├── agents/           # 24 agents
└── skills/           # 47 skills

vulndocs/             # 680+ patterns
docs/                 # 20 docs
.planning/            # Roadmap/state
```

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/truevkg/alphaswarm.git && cd alphaswarm
uv tool install -e .
alphaswarm build-kg contracts/
# In Claude Code: /vrs-audit contracts/
```
